---
title: "Setup Instructions"
format: html
---

# Dependencies

- conda or mamba
- uv
- `git submodule --init --update` to clone the external dependencies (EFM3D is installed from local source)

# Setup Instructions

## Installation via separate uv envirnoment

```bash
cd oracle_rri
conda create -f environment.yml
conda activate aria-nbv

uv sync --extra dev --extra notebook --extra pytorch3d
```

This will install all dependencies and create a new python environment in `oracle_rri/.venv`.

## Direct Installation into the Conda Environment

```bash
cd oracle_rri
conda env create -f environment.yml
conda activate aria-nbv

uv pip install --python "$(which python)" -e ".[dev, notebook]"
uv pip install --python "$(which python)" -e ".[pytorch3d]"
uv pip install --python "$(which python)" -e ../external/efm3d

echo "Verifying installation..."
python -c "import efm3d; import oracle_rri; print('All packages installed successfully')"
echo "Setup complete! Activate with: conda activate aria-nbv"
```

<!-- #TODO: Correct -->
## PyTorch3D Setup
https://github.com/facebookresearch/pytorch3d/blob/main/INSTALL.md
```py
╰─ conda install pytorch3d -c pytorch3d
```

# Data Setup

- download the [Dinov2 ViTB14 checkpoint](https://huggingface.co/zgcr654321/pretrained_models/blob/cc2e7aace55d6f06716dcf444c29d97bac0a99da/dinov2_pretrain_official_pytorch_weights/dinov2_vitb14_reg4_pretrain.pth) and place it in `.logs/ckpts/`
-
